title: Ice Emperor
description:
Its a super power data pack with 5 powers and freeze
its also have texture pack 'ice Emperor rp' 
version from 1.16 to latest
body:
This time I present you "Ice Emperor Data Pack".
its a Super Power Data pack.

Ice Emperor Data pack work by Creating Ice Armor set,
All recipes are mention in the images,
Ice Emperor have 5 powers with 1 Sneak + Jump Freeze power,
after activation of Armor eye becomes aqua and health will be 50hp,
Ice Emperor Texture pack have glowing effects [Emission],
after activation all 5 powers are divided into 5 Slots,
first 5 slots are the powers,
1 slot works when you hit any entity,
other 4 slots work without hitting any entity just left click.

All 5 powers and Freeze are-

1] Ice Touch        [Touch any entity will be capture in ice prison]
2] Water Zone       [Create own water area, water surround you]
3] Ice Blast        [Summons 4 Ice Creeper and Blast them to destroy your enemy]
4] Weather Control  [Control the weather into rain and makes night with your extra Strength, Speed , Regeneration , night vision and Health with freeze surrounding water and lava into ice]
5] Clear Weather    [Clear the weather and makes day and you will loose your extra Strength, Speed , Regeneration , night vision and Health with unfreeze the surrounding ice into water]
6] Freeze           [By Sneak + Jump you will be able to freeze surrounding water and lava into ice]

Please Read Everything Carefully Before Using the Data Pack

Optifine required for texture pack.
Without Optifine texture pack may not work properly.

Ice Emperor Have two Packs without both packs Ice Emperor may not work properly

1] Ice Emperor DP [Data Pack]
2] Ice Emperor RP [Texture Pack]

Create new world with Data pack and reload it [/reload]
or you can use in your old world by first reload it [/reload]

Crafting recipe of Ice Emperor Armor Set-

1] Helmet      [1 Netherite Helmet + 8 packed ice surrounding the Helmet]
2] Chestplate  [1 Netherite Chestplate + 8 packed ice surrounding the Chestplate]
3] Leggings    [1 Netherite Leggings + 8 packed ice surrounding the Leggings]
4] Boots       [1 Netherite Boots + 8 packed ice surrounding the Boots]
5] Sword       [1 Netherite Sword + 8 packed ice surrounding the Sword]


This pack is supported both single player world and multiplayer servers.


version supported
form- 1.16 TO Latest version

make sure you check the file version before downloading the pack
all versions have separate files


Enjoy the "Ice Emperor DataPack".


THANKS FOR DOWNLOADING.
